Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Oct-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. LEVI PLESSET, ESQ. of Kabateck Brown Kellner LLP, Tel No. 213-217-5000 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court determines that Plaintiff did not timely contest the Court's tentative ruling. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SUPERFISH INC.'S Motion To Stay Proceedings is granted. The claims in this case are subsumed in the federal MDL case. The factors highlighted in Caiafa Prof. Law Corp. v. State Farm Fire & Cas. Co., (1993) 15 Cal.App.4th 800, 804, weigh in favor of a stay. A stay will avoid duplicative work, unseemly conflicts, and the prejudice to plaintiff is limited. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
